CustomField.description: The probability that the prospect's transferable AUM actually would move with them if they were to change firms. Note that this only applies to their estimated transferable AUM, not their total AUM.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The probability that the prospect's transferable AUM actually would move with them if they were to change firms. Note that this only applies to their estimated transferable AUM, not their total AUM.
CustomField.label: Transferability Probability
